name: Ethos Golf - Allen
about: Ethos Golf - Allen is a premium indoor golf training facility equipped with advanced technology, including golf simulators and a Sportsbox 3D studio for biomechanical swing analysis. It operates on a membership-only model, providing unlimited 24/7 access to its facilities with a minimum 90-day commitment. The venue offers personalized professional instruction and immersive training experiences on world-renowned courses, making it ideal for serious practice and game improvement. Members can reserve private bays exclusively for their use, with a focus on high-quality training and performance tracking.
why_golfers_like_it: Unlimited 24/7 access to premium facilities and simulators
Revolutionary Sportsbox 3D swing analysis for precise biomechanical feedback
Private bay reservations ensuring an exclusive training environment
